### 9. A robot startup is wreaking havoc on short-term rentals in San Francisco — Airbnb hosts allege 'guests' secretly tested robots indoors, left the units completely trashed

- **Source**: Tom's Hardware
- **Date**: 2026-05-30
- **Tags**: Cisco
- **Link**: https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/a-robot-startup-is-wreaking-havoc-on-short-term-rentals-in-san-francisco-airbnb-hosts-allege-guests-secretly-tested-robots-indoors-left-the-units-completely-trashed

> Picture this: you're the owner of a dainty place in San Francisco. You put it up on Airbnb, considering the area is sprawling with AI bros, thinking you'd get a pretty good return on your investment. What you actually get in return are scratched kitchens, damaged appliances, bizarre rearrangement...
